Interface OpenApi2xParameter

All Superinterfaces:
Node, OpenApiParameter, Parameter, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi20Parameter
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi20ParameterImpl
public interface OpenApi2xParameter extends OpenApiParameter
